title: VSAC Value Sets
description: This page indexes the Value Set Authority Center (VSAC) library — the canonical source of clinical terminology value sets used by CMS eCQMs. Each value set groups codes from SNOMED CT, ICD-10-CM, LOINC, RxNorm, CPT, or HCPCS that collectively represent a clinical concept used in quality measurement.
tips: Search by name (e.g. 'diabetes') or paste an OID directly to find a specific value set.
Filter by code system to narrow results to ICD-10-CM, SNOMED CT, LOINC, RxNorm, CPT, or HCPCS.
Click a value set name to see its codes, OMOP concept mappings, and which CMS measures reference it.
The OMOP concepts column shows how many codes have been mapped to OMOP standard concepts — high coverage means better cohort fidelity.
Value sets are versioned by expansion date — the expansion version is shown on the detail page.
